title: Micron Technology to Report Fiscal Second Quarter Results on March 28, 2023
text: BOISE, Idaho, Feb. 16, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Micron Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: MU), announced today that it will hold its fiscal second quarter earnings conference call on Tuesday, March 28, 2023, at 2:30 p.m. Mountain time.

title: Micron Technology Announces Upcoming Investor Event
text: BOISE, Idaho, Feb. 16, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Micron Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: MU), announced today that company executives will participate in a fireside chat at Susquehanna's Twelfth Annual Technology Conference. The event will be webcast live on Thursday, March 2 at 6:30 a.m. Mountain time.
